responsibilities: • teach ca foundation, inter, and final subjects  (as per specialization)   • develop structured lesson plans, notes, and revision material   • conduct regular tests, mock exams, and doubt -clearing sessions   • simplify complex accounting, taxation, and audit concepts   • stay updated with icai syllabus, amendments, and  notifications   • mentor students for exam strategy and career guidance   • support online and offline teaching modes
qualifications: • qualified chartered accountant   • strong subject expertise and presentation skills   • teaching or industry experience preferred
